name: Orangel Maestre
description: '''Orangel Maestre Socarrás'''{{family name footnote|Maestre|Socarrás|lang=Spanish}} (born 1961), also known as '''El Pangue''', is a Colombian [[vallenato]] accordionist. He was crowned vallenato king in 1984 for winning the professional accordionist competition of the [[Vallenato Legend Festival]]. He has recorded albums with singers including {{ill|Silvio Brito|es}} and [[Iván Villazón]].
